I will search for their birth dates on Wikipedia.", "tool_name_0": "search_wikipedia", "tool_args_0": {"query": "Joris Ivens birth date, Lew Landers birth date"}, "observation_0": ["Lew Landers | Lew Landers (January 2, 1901 – December 16, 1962) was an American independent film and television director.", "Joris Ivens | Georg Henri Anton \"Joris\" Ivens (18 November 1898 – 28 June 1989) was a Dutch documentary filmmaker. Among the notable films he directed or co-directed are \"A Tale of the Wind\", \"The Spanish Earth\", \"Rain\", \"...A Valparaiso\", \"Misère au Borinage\" (\"Borinage\"), \"\", \"The Seine Meets Paris\", \"Far from Vietnam\", \"Pour le Mistral\" and \"How Yukong Moved the Mountains\".", "Tim Lewens | Tim Lewens (born 29 June 1974) is a professor in the history and philosophy of biology, medicine, and bioethics at the Department of History and Philosophy of Science at the University of Cambridge. Joris Ivens was born on November 18, 1898, while Lew Landers was born on January 2, 1901. Therefore, Joris Ivens is the director who was born in November.", "tool_name_1": "finish", "tool_args_1": {}, "observation_1": "Completed."}, "reasoning": "Joris Ivens was born on November 18, 1898, while Lew Landers was born on January 2, 1901. Since Joris Ivens has a birth date in November, he is the director who was born in that month.", "answer": "Joris Ivens"}

    instructions="Given the fields `question`, produce the fields `answer`.\n\nYou are an Agent. In each episode, you will be given the fields `question` as input.
